candidates.row_label: Depreciation, amortization and impairment of fixed assets
candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line above operating result, but it is a company-wide operating D&A/impairment total and is not labeled as COGS/cost of sales related. Adding it to COGS would risk misallocation and double counting.

Label is too generic, appears after associated company/other non-core rows, and has no visible values in the preview. Not enough evidence that it is an operating COGS-specific D&A row to add separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is only 'Goods for resale'. The excerpt shows no COGS-specific depreciation/amortization row. A separate total operating D&A row exists, but it cannot be reliably assigned to COGS from this preview.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation, amortization and impairment of fixed assets
candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line above operating result, so it appears outside the selected SG&A component rows. However, it is a combined operating D&A/impairment total and not clearly SG&A-only; it may also include production/other functions, so assigning it to XSGA alone would be unsafe.
Generic label with no visible values and unclear placement/purpose. It is not clearly an SG&A-specific operating D&A row.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Other External Costs', 'Other Operating Expense', and 'Employee benefits expense'. The separate line 'Depreciation, amortization and impairment of fixed assets' looks outside those rows, but it is not function-specific and may include more than SG&A; conservative output avoids double counting. No explicit 'Amortization in SGA' or similar row is shown.
